title: P5-06 User rights affordances module
acceptance_criteria: Via cheerio over crawled DOM: detect auth surface (login/register links/forms), account/settings link, and rights affordances — 'delete account', 'download/export my data', 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information / Your Privacy Choices'
Only emit a signal when an auth/account surface is detected (informational sites are N/A → INFO 'not applicable: no account surface observed'). FAIL-CLOSED to 'not evaluated' when no DOM available
Factual signals only, no verdict/score; moduleId 'P5-06', category 'Privacy & Compliance'; regulation refs context only
Pure function — NO new outbound request
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
